problem id: a897b8bc
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHR(1)

examples:
  11110111 -> 11111111
  01101110 -> 11111111
  11010010 -> 01111011
  00001010 -> 01000101
  11010101 -> 11111010
  01110101 -> 10111110
  01101001 -> 00111101
  01101111 -> 11111111
  10110001 -> 01111110
  00010110 -> 11001011

query: 11001000
predicted answer: 01111101
